name: com.apple.security.pem
title: Certificate (PEM)
description: The payload that configures a PEM-formatted certificate.

payload.content: PEM-encoded certificate without private key. May contain root certificates.

payloadkeys.title: Payload Certificate Filename
payloadkeys.content: The file name of the enclosed certificate.

payloadkeys.title: Payload Certificate Data
payloadkeys.content: The binary representation of the payload, encoded in Base64.
